deck.author: OpenAI Codex
deck.subject: Demonstration presentation
deck.title: Intro to Aalto
deck.outline:
1. Intro to Aalto - Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution focused on educating future thought-leaders through six distinct schools.
2. Six Schools, One Vision - Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science.
3. Next Steps: Apply or Visit - Aalto offers open courses, scholarships, and campus visits for everyone regardless of background.

slide-01.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution focused on educating future thought-leaders through six distinct schools. without reducing readability.
slide-01.mustInclude: Aalto University is a multidisciplinary institution focused on educating future thought-leaders through six distinct schools.
slide-01.notes: Use official Aalto University homepage and admissions pages to confirm identity and language options (EN/FI/SV).
slide-01.title: Intro to Aalto
slide-01.value: You gain a clear understanding of the university's core mission and official entry points.

slide-02.layoutHint: Use a clear visual treatment that reinforces Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science. without reducing readability.
slide-02.mustInclude: Aalto operates through six schools covering Arts, Engineering, Business, Chemical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, and Science.
slide-02.notes: Use official Aalto University homepage and admissions pages to confirm identity and language options (EN/FI/SV).
slide-02.title: Six Schools, One Vision
slide-02.value: You can identify the specific academic areas and research strengths available at Aalto.

slide-03.layoutHint: Include a clear call-to-action button graphic or icon for 'Apply' and 'Visit'.
slide-03.mustInclude: Aalto offers open courses, scholarships, and campus visits for everyone regardless of background.
slide-03.notes: Use clear call-to-action graphics for Apply and Visit buttons.
slide-03.title: Next Steps: Apply or Visit
slide-03.value: You know exactly how to engage with Aalto through admissions, open courses, or campus visits.
